_readme: This file tracks all labels added to Product Label Search. Read it at the start of every label-addition session to see what's already registered. After adding a new label, add its entry here before finishing.

labels.name: AzaMax Xtra Insecticide
labels.activeIngredient: 11.82 g/L Azadirachtin A & B (from 29.55 g/L Azadirachta indica extract)

labels.name: VIVANDO Fungicide
labels.activeIngredient: 500 g/L SDHI active ingredient (pending full label details)

labels.name: Absolve Peracetic Acid Biocide
labels.activeIngredient: 160 g/L Peroxyacetic Acid, 110 g/L Hydrogen Peroxide

labels.name: AGSPEC Cop-IT
labels.activeIngredient: 93 g/L Copper (Cu) present as Copper Ammonium Acetate Complex

labels.name: Corteva Tordon RegrowthMaster Herbicide
labels.activeIngredient: 200 g/L Triclopyr + 100 g/L Picloram + 25 g/L Aminopyralid
labels.notes: Group 4 herbicide (synthetic auxin) with three active ingredients for control of unwanted timber by stem injection or cut stump, and blackberry, gorse and harrisia cactus by high volume spray. Non-crop areas, forests, pastures, rights-of-way.

labels.name: Designer® Enhanced Wetter and Sticker
labels.activeIngredient: 385 g/L Organosilicone Surfactant Fluid, 255 g/L Synthetic Latex

labels.name: DiPel® DF Biological Insecticide
labels.activeIngredient: Bacillus thuringiensis subsp. kurstaki, strain ABTS-351

labels.name: Gravitate 707 Spray Adjuvant
labels.activeIngredient: 340 g/L Vegetable Oil Ester, 225 g/L Soyal Phospholipids, 142 g/L Citric Acid

labels.name: Corteva Grazon® Extra Herbicide
labels.activeIngredient: Triclopyr (300 g/L) + Picloram (100 g/L) + Aminopyralid (8 g/L)

labels.name: Hasten Spray Adjuvant
labels.activeIngredient: Canola Oil Esters (704 g/L) + Surfactant (196 g/L)

labels.name: Kocide® Blue Xtra® Fungicide
labels.activeIngredient: 350 g/kg COPPER present as Cupric hydroxide

labels.name: Nordox 750 WG Copper Fungicide
labels.activeIngredient: 750 g/kg Copper (Cu) present as Cuprous Oxide

labels.name: Nufarm Activator Adjuvant
labels.notes: Premium non-ionic surfactant/wetting agent with rainfast qualities and low foaming. 13 use situations covering herbicides, insecticides, fungicides, woody weeds, fire fighting, pasture topping, and turf watering.

labels.name: Nufarm Collide 700 Adjuvant
labels.activeIngredient: 700 g/L Alkylpolyglucosides + Propionic Acid + Modified Vegetable Oil

labels.name: Nufarm Intervene Fungicide
labels.notes: Group 19 contact fungicide (chitin synthesis inhibitor) for botrytis, powdery mildew, alternaria in apples, almonds, berries, cherries, grapes, basil, thyme. Certified Allowed Input (ACO Cert. No. 11540).

labels.name: Nufarm Pyroxasulfone 850 WG
labels.notes: Pre-emergent herbicide for wheat, triticale, chickpeas, field peas, lentils, lupins. 118 g/ha single rate. Controls annual grasses and some broadleaf weeds. Requires incorporation by sowing (IBS) within 3 days. DO NOT plant durum wheat after. Important crop rotation restrictions.

labels.name: OCP AzaMax Insecticide
labels.activeIngredient: 11.82 g/L Azadirachtin A and B (29.55 g/L Azadirachta indica extract)

labels.name: Prowess Fungicide
labels.activeIngredient: 300 g/L Phosphorous (Phosphonic) Acid (mono and di-ammonium phosphite)

labels.name: PCT REACTOR SURFACTANT 700
labels.activeIngredient: 350 g/L SOYAL PHOSPHOLIPIDS, 350 g/L PROPIONIC ACID

labels.name: PCT REACTOR RED DYE SPRAY MARKER DYE LIQUID MARKING DYE
Serenade Opti Biofungicide
labels.activeIngredient: 1.3 x 10^10 CFU/g Bacillus amyloliquefaciens strain QST 713

labels.name: Serenade Prime Soil Ameliorant and Biofungicide
labels.activeIngredient: Not less than 1.0 X 1012 CFU/L Bacillus amyloliquefaciens strain QST 713

labels.name: Surefire Buffalo, Bindi & Broadleaf Weedkiller
labels.activeIngredient: 200 g/L Bromoxynil (as n-octanoyl ester) + 200 g/L MCPA (as ethyl hexyl ester)

labels.name: Surefire Glyphosate 360 Herbicide
labels.activeIngredient: 360 g/L GLYPHOSATE (present as the isopropylamine salt)

labels.name: Surefire Multi Turf Herbicide
labels.activeIngredient: 300 g/L MCPA (as potassium salt) + 20 g/L Clopyralid (as potassium salt) + 15 g/L Diflufenican

labels.name: Surefire WeedPro 540 Bio Herbicide
labels.activeIngredient: 540 g/L Glyphosate (present as the isopropylamine salt)

labels.name: Tri-Base Blue® Fungicide
labels.activeIngredient: 190 g/litre copper as tribasic copper sulphate

labels.name: Buff-It Spray Adjuvant
labels.activeIngredient: 545 g/L Non-ionic Fatty Acid Ethoxylates, 383 g/L Propionic Acid, 192 g/L Triethanolamine

labels.name: ProGibb LV Plus Plant Growth Regulator
VIVUS MAX® Helicoverpa Biocontrol
labels.activeIngredient: 5 × 10⁹ PIBs of Nucleopolyhedrovirus of Helicoverpa armigera per mL

labels.name: XenTari® WG Biological Insecticide
labels.activeIngredient: Bacillus thuringiensis subsp. aizawai, Strain ABTS-1857

Campbell Poachek® Herbicide
labels.activeIngredient: 175 g/L Endothal (present as the dipotassium salt)
